attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386 (stripped to external PDB), for MS Windows

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: Detects imphash often found in malware samples (Zero hits with with search for 'imphash:x p:0' on Virustotal)
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: Arnim Rupp (https://github.com/ruppde)

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: contain loop
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    lib: true
    scope: function
    examples:
      - 08AC667C65D36D6542917655571E61C8:0x406EAA
  features:
    - or:
      - characteristic: loop
      - characteristic: tight loop
      - characteristic: recursive call
signature_matches.name: contain loop

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: contain a resource (.rsrc) section
    namespace: executable/pe/section/rsrc
    authors:
      - moritz.raabe@mandiant.com
    scope: file
    examples:
      - A933A1A402775CFA94B6BEE0963F4B46:0x41fd25
  features:
    - section: .rsrc
signature_matches.name: contain a resource (.rsrc) section

signature_matches.rule_src:
rule:
  meta:
    name: reference anti-VM strings targeting Xen
    namespace: anti-analysis/anti-vm/vm-detection
    authors:
      - michael.hunhoff@mandiant.com
    scope: file
    att&ck:
      - Defense Evasion::Virtualization/Sandbox Evasion::System Checks [T1497.001]
    mbc:
      - Anti-Behavioral Analysis::Virtual Machine Detection [B0009]
    references:
      - https://github.com/LordNoteworthy/al-khaser/blob/master/al-khaser/AntiVM/Xen.cpp
    examples:
      - al-khaser_x86.exe_
  features:
    - or:
      - string: /^Xen/i
      - string: /XenVMMXenVMM/i
      - string: /xenservice.exe/i
      - string: /XenVMMXenVMM/i
      - string: /HVM domU/i
signature_matches.name: reference anti-VM strings targeting Xen

attributes.text:
YARA Signature Match - THOR APT Scanner

RULE: SUSP_OBF_VMProtect_Jan24
RULE_SET: Livehunt - Suspicious3 Indicators 🏹
RULE_TYPE: THOR APT Scanner's rule set only 🔨
RULE_LINK: https://valhalla.nextron-systems.com/info/rule/SUSP_OBF_VMProtect_Jan24
DESCRIPTION: Detects binaries obfuscated with VMProtect 2.X-3.X. VMProtect is a commercial virtualization and obfuscation solution. Pirated versions are used in a variety of malicious software
REFERENCE: https://vmpsoft.com/vmprotect/overview
RULE_AUTHOR: Jonathan Peters

Detection Timestamp: 2025-01-27 18:39
AV Detection Ratio: 🟢 61 / 72

Use these tags to search for similar matches: #obf #vmprotect #susp_obf_vmprotect_jan24
More information: https://www.nextron-systems.com/notes-on-virustotal-matches/
